modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the last run date of a Cognos report

full_description_text:  
The user is seeking information on a specific Cognos report. They want to know when it was last executed. This request indicates a need for tracking report usage and performance. The user may require this information for reporting or analysis purposes.
